description:
The OpenVPN Configuration Generator is designed to make generating server and client configurations for an OpenVPN server and Viscosity easier.


Change Notes:
- Improved: Adds a default MTU of 1420 to server configurations
- Updated: OpenSSL updated to version 3.5.7

Files:
- ovpngen-2.0.2-macos.pkg - macOS installer package
- ovpngen-2.0.2-windows.exe - Windows installer executable
- ovpngen-2.0.2-linux-x86_64.deb - Debian/Ubuntu installer package (x86_64)
- ovpngen-2.0.2-linux-arm64.deb - Debian/Ubuntu installer package (arm64)
- ovpngen-2.0.2-linux-x86_64.rpm - RedHat/Fedora installer package (x86_64)
- ovpngen-2.0.2-linux-arm64.rpm - RedHat/Fedora installer package (arm64)
- ovpngen-2.0.2-linux-x86_64.tar.xz - Linux generic binary archive (x86_64)
- ovpngen-2.0.2-linux-arm64.tar.xz - Linux generic binary archive (arm64)
